As a feasibility study, we show how such scores can be estimated via cross-document alignment between informal texts and Lean formalizations, enabling large-scale analysis of formalization coverage. This framework is a first step toward integrating bibliographic and formal mathematical ecosystems into scalable, machine-actionable knowledge graphs linking publications to formal proof objects.

摘要：數學知識分散在文獻資料庫（例如，MathSciNet、zbMATH Open）和正式證明庫（例如，Lean mathlib）之間，這阻礙了已發表結果與其形式化之間的統一訪問。我們提出了一個關聯橋接資料庫，將出版元數據與正式文物對齊，提供數學文獻與機器可驗證證明之間的互操作性層。我們引入了一個論文級別的形式化分數，衡量一篇出版物在正式系統中被覆蓋的程度。作為可行性研究，我們展示了如何通過非正式文本與Lean形式化之間的跨文檔對齊來估計這些分數，從而實現對形式化覆蓋的規模化分析。這一框架是將文獻和正式數學生態系統整合成可擴展的、機器可操作的知識圖譜，將出版物與正式證明對象連結的第一步。

docs.title: A PubMed-Scale Dataset of Structured Biomedical Abstracts
docs.text:
2606.11361v1 by Chia-Hsuan Chang, Haerin Song, Brian Ondov, Hua Xu

Structured abstracts are important for biomedical literature processing, by facilitating information retrieval, text mining, and knowledge synthesis. However, a vast portion of abstracts indexed in PubMed remain unstructured, presenting a significant bottleneck for downstream text-processing workflows and applications. To resolve this limitation, we introduce Structured PubMed, a comprehensive corpus of section-labeled biomedical abstracts compiled from the complete PubMed database, encompassing over 23.2 million research-article records. The corpus is divided into two distinct subsets: a collection of 5.9 million author-structured abstracts parsed from official XML files, and an automatically labeled collection of 17.2 million originally unstructured abstracts structured via a verbatim-extraction Large Language Model pipeline. Every record is harmonized under a unified five-section schema and mapped to its original PubMed identifier, publication type, and publication date. This dataset can be utilized to train sentence-classification models, benchmark text-segmentation architectures, and perform large-scale, section-specific information extraction at an unprecedented PubMed-wide scale.

摘要：結構化摘要對於生物醫學文獻處理非常重要，因為它促進了信息檢索、文本挖掘和知識綜合。然而，PubMed中索引的絕大部分摘要仍然是非結構化的，這對下游文本處理工作流程和應用程序造成了重大瓶頸。為了解決這一限制，我們推出了結構化PubMed，這是一個全面的生物醫學摘要語料庫，包含來自完整PubMed數據庫的部分標記摘要，涵蓋超過2320萬條研究文章記錄。該語料庫分為兩個不同的子集：一個是從官方XML文件中解析出的590萬條作者結構化摘要的集合，另一個是通過逐字提取大型語言模型管道結構化的1720萬條最初非結構化摘要的自動標記集合。每條記錄都在統一的五部分架構下進行了協調，並映射到其原始的PubMed標識符、出版類型和出版日期。這個數據集可以用來訓練句子分類模型、基準文本分割架構，並在前所未有的PubMed範圍內進行大規模、特定部分的信息提取。

docs.title: Quantized Stochastic Primal-Dual Methods for Distributed Optimization under Relaxed Global Geometry
docs.text:
2606.11339v1 by Susmit Sarkar, Abhinav Raghuvanshi, Kushal Chakrabarti, Mayank Baranwal

We study distributed optimization with stochastic gradients and finite-bit communication modeled by random (unbiased) quantization. We propose q-PDGD, a quantized stochastic primal-dual method, and analyze it under relaxed global geometry. Under restricted secant inequality (RSI), a constant step-size yields linear contraction to an explicit neighborhood determined by gradient noise, quantization distortion, and network connectivity, while a diminishing step-size achieves O(1/k) convergence without shared-minimizer assumptions. Under Polyak-Lojasiewicz (PL) inequality, we obtain linear-to-neighborhood convergence in the same stochastic quantized setting. Our results match the best-known centralized stochastic rates in oracle complexity, and are supported by experiments demonstrating the predicted tradeoffs between quantization level, step-size choice, and graph structure.

摘要：我們研究具有隨機梯度和有限位元通信的分散優化，這些通信由隨機（無偏）量化建模。我們提出了 q-PDGD，一種量化的隨機原始-對偶方法，並在放寬的全局幾何下進行分析。在限制割線不等式（RSI）下，恆定的步長產生線性收斂到由梯度噪聲、量化失真和網絡連通性決定的明確鄰域，而逐漸減小的步長則在不需要共享最小化者假設的情況下實現 O(1/k) 收斂。在 Polyak-Lojasiewicz（PL）不等式下，我們在相同的隨機量化設置中獲得線性到鄰域的收斂。我們的結果與在預言者複雜度中已知的最佳集中隨機速率相匹配，並且有實驗支持預測的量化水平、步長選擇和圖結構之間的權衡。

docs.title: A Unifying Lens on Supervised Fine-Tuning Through Target Distribution Design
docs.text:
2606.11189v1 by Tong Xie, Yuanhao Ban, Yunqi Hong, Sohyun An, Yihang Chen, Cho-Jui Hsieh

Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) typically maximizes the likelihood of every token in a demonstrated trajectory. However, an observed token can be non-unique, noisy, or misaligned with the model prior. Strictly fitting toward this one-hot target may be suboptimal, especially when the pretrained model encodes a rich knowledge prior. In this work, we reinterpret SFT as target distribution design: instead of studying only the loss objective, we analyze the token-level target that the loss drives the model to match. We introduce the Q-target framework, which decomposes SFT supervision into two explicit choices: (1) how strongly to rely on the observed token, and (2) how to allocate the remaining probability mass over alternatives. This perspective unifies many existing SFT variants as implicit choices of the target distribution Q. Building on this view, we propose Target-SFT which constructs the training objective directly from the desired target distribution. This method consistently outperforms across the ten reasoning dataset-model settings evaluated, showing the effectiveness of this target-based approach. Overall, our formulation reveals a more fundamental design principle for SFT training and opens a broader search space for SFT objectives.

摘要：監督微調 (SFT) 通常會最大化每個在示範軌跡中的標記的可能性。然而，觀察到的標記可能是非唯一的、嘈雜的，或與模型的先驗不一致。嚴格地朝著這個單一目標進行擬合可能不是最佳的，特別是當預訓練模型編碼了豐富的知識先驗時。在本研究中，我們將 SFT 重新詮釋為目標分佈設計：我們不僅研究損失目標，還分析損失驅動模型匹配的標記級目標。我們引入了 Q-target 框架，將 SFT 監督分解為兩個明確的選擇：(1) 依賴觀察到的標記的強度，和 (2) 如何將剩餘的概率質量分配給其他選擇。這種觀點統一了許多現有的 SFT 變體，作為目標分佈 Q 的隱含選擇。基於這一觀點，我們提出了 Target-SFT，該方法直接從所需的目標分佈構建訓練目標。這種方法在評估的十個推理數據集-模型設置中始終表現優於其他方法，顯示了這種基於目標的方法的有效性。總體而言，我們的公式揭示了 SFT 訓練的一個更基本的設計原則，並為 SFT 目標開辟了更廣泛的搜索空間。

docs.title: FlowBank: Query-Adaptive Agentic Workflows Optimization through Precompute-and-Reuse
docs.text:
2606.11290v1 by Lingzhi Yuan, Chenghao Deng, Fangxu Yu, Souradip Chakraborty, Mohammad Rostami, Furong Huang

Large Language Model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems are increasingly powerful, but current agentic workflow optimization paradigms make an unsatisfying trade-off. Task-level methods spend substantial offline compute yet deploy only a single workflow, leaving complementary candidates unused, while query-level methods synthesize a new workflow per query at substantial inference cost. Our motivating analysis shows these paradigms are more complementary than competing: workflows discovered during offline search often solve different subsets of queries, and many queries handled by expensive query-level generation can already be solved by cheaper precomputed workflows. This suggests a different objective: rather than searching for one universally best workflow or regenerating one per instance, we should build a compact bank of reusable, complementary workflows and select among them adaptively at inference time. Doing so requires solving three coupled problems: generating complementary rather than redundant candidates, compressing them into a small deployable portfolio, and assigning each query to the right workflow under a performance-cost trade-off. To this end, we present FlowBank, a three-stage framework for portfolio-based agentic workflow optimization. Diversifying proposes DiverseFlow to steer search toward under-covered queries and produce a high-coverage candidate pool. Curating proposes CuraFlow to compress this pool into a compact portfolio with minimal redundancy. Matching casts deployment as edge-value prediction on a query-workflow bipartite graph and routes each incoming query to the portfolio member with the best predicted utility. Across five benchmarks, FlowBank achieves the highest average score among the evaluated methods while remaining cost-competitive, improving over the strongest automated and handcrafted baselines by 4.26% and 14.92% relative, respectively.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLM）基礎的多代理系統越來越強大，但當前的代理工作流程優化範式卻做出了不令人滿意的權衡。任務級別的方法花費大量的離線計算，但僅部署單一工作流程，讓互補的候選者未被利用，而查詢級別的方法則在相當大的推理成本下為每個查詢合成新的工作流程。我們的動機分析顯示這些範式更具互補性而非競爭性：在離線搜索中發現的工作流程通常解決不同子集的查詢，而許多由昂貴的查詢級生成處理的查詢，實際上已經可以由較便宜的預計算工作流程解決。這暗示著一個不同的目標：與其尋找一個普遍最佳的工作流程或為每個實例重新生成一個，不如建立一個緊湊的可重用互補工作流程庫，並在推理時自適應地從中選擇。這樣做需要解決三個耦合問題：生成互補而非冗餘的候選者，將它們壓縮成一個小型可部署的投資組合，以及在性能與成本的權衡下將每個查詢分配給正確的工作流程。為此，我們提出了FlowBank，一個基於投資組合的代理工作流程優化的三階段框架。多樣化提出了DiverseFlow，旨在引導搜索朝向未被充分覆蓋的查詢，並產生一個高覆蓋率的候選池。策展提出了CuraFlow，將這個候選池壓縮成一個最小冗餘的緊湊投資組合。匹配將部署視為查詢-工作流程二分圖上的邊值預測，並將每個進來的查詢路由到預測效用最佳的投資組合成員。在五個基準測試中，FlowBank在評估的方法中實現了最高的平均分數，同時保持成本競爭力，分別比最強的自動化和手工基準提高了4.26%和14.92%。

docs.title: Flaws in the LLM Automation Narrative
docs.text:
2606.11166v1 by George Perrett, Javae Elliott, Jennifer Hill, Marc Scott

Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly described as performing at the level of human experts on knowledge economy tasks. These claims are primarily based on how LLMs perform on benchmarking tasks that measure average performance across standardized datasets. Primary limitations of many benchmarking tasks are that they often measure performance based on content directly included in LLM training data, and they frequently do not assess the reliability of LLM performance or the magnitude of LLM errors. However, in high stakes contexts, these qualities are critically important. Through a novel LLM benchmarking task that requires writing computer code to complete a data analysis task, we compare the performance of a frontier LLM against submissions from human experts and explicitly measure the variance of responses and the magnitude of errors. Our study reveals that the human experts perform better on average on a range of metrics and demonstrate less variability in performance. Our results provide evidence that LLMs do not consistently perform at the level of human experts and demonstrate the importance of measuring variance and assessing error magnitude in LLM benchmark evaluations.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被描述為在知識經濟任務中達到人類專家的水平。這些說法主要基於LLMs在基準任務中的表現，這些任務測量的是在標準化數據集上的平均表現。許多基準任務的主要限制在於，它們通常根據直接包含在LLM訓練數據中的內容來衡量表現，並且經常不評估LLM表現的可靠性或LLM錯誤的大小。然而，在高風險的情境中，這些特質是至關重要的。通過一項新穎的LLM基準任務，要求編寫計算機代碼以完成數據分析任務，我們將前沿LLM的表現與人類專家的提交進行比較，並明確測量反應的變異性和錯誤的大小。我們的研究顯示，人類專家在多個指標上的平均表現更佳，並且表現的變異性較小。我們的結果提供了證據表明LLMs並不總是能夠達到人類專家的水平，並且顯示了在LLM基準評估中測量變異性和評估錯誤大小的重要性。

docs.title: ABC-Bench: An Agentic Bio-Capabilities Benchmark for Biosecurity
docs.text:
2606.11150v1 by Andrew Bo Liu, Samira Nedungadi, Bryce Cai, Alex Kleinman, Harmon Bhasin, Seth Donoughe

Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly acquiring capabilities relevant to biological research, from literature synthesis to interpretation of experimental data. Increasingly, LLM agents can also perform in silico biology tasks that previously required experienced human biologists. These emerging AI capabilities offer new opportunities for scientific discovery and biomedical advances, but they also shift the landscape of biosecurity risks. To address this, we introduce the Agentic Bio-Capabilities Benchmark (ABC-Bench), a suite of tasks to measure agentic biosecurity-relevant capabilities. ABC-Bench evaluates LLM agents on both benign and dual-use biology tasks: writing code to operate liquid handling robots, designing DNA fragments for in vitro assembly, and evading DNA synthesis screening. These tasks require a combination of biology and software expertise. All tested LLM agents outperformed the median expert human baseliner on all three tasks. Agents performed highly on tasks drawing on published knowledge and well-documented protocols, and more weakly on a task requiring novel bioinformatics reasoning. In three wet-lab validation experiments, we found that OpenAI's o4-mini-high produced scripts that, when run on an OpenTrons liquid handling robot, successfully assembled DNA with expected sequences.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）正在迅速獲得與生物研究相關的能力，從文獻綜述到實驗數據的解釋。越來越多的 LLM 代理也能執行以前需要經驗豐富的人類生物學家的計算生物學任務。這些新興的 AI 能力為科學發現和生物醫學進步提供了新的機會，但它們也改變了生物安全風險的格局。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了代理生物能力基準（ABC-Bench），這是一套用於測量與生物安全相關的代理能力的任務。ABC-Bench 在良性和雙用途生物學任務上評估 LLM 代理：編寫操作液體處理機器人的代碼、設計用於體外組裝的 DNA 片段，以及躲避 DNA 合成篩查。這些任務需要生物學和軟件專業知識的結合。所有測試的 LLM 代理在這三項任務上均超過了中位數專家人類基準。代理在依賴已發表知識和良好記錄的協議的任務上表現優異，而在需要新穎生物信息學推理的任務上表現較弱。在三個濕實驗室驗證實驗中，我們發現 OpenAI 的 o4-mini-high 生成的腳本在 OpenTrons 液體處理機器人上運行時，成功組裝了具有預期序列的 DNA。

docs.title: Towards Autonomous Accelerator Design: FPGA Accelerator Generation with SECDA
docs.text:
2606.11117v1 by Vinamra Sharma, Xingjian Fu, Jude Haris, José Cano

Designing FPGA-based accelerators for modern artificial intelligence workloads requires exploring a large and complex hardware design space that involves architectural parameters, data flow strategies, and memory hierarchies, making the process very time consuming. While existing methodologies such as SECDA enable rapid hardware-software co-design through SystemC simulation and FPGA execution, identifying efficient accelerator configurations remains a largely manual process requiring extensive domain knowledge. SECDA-DSE is a framework that integrates Large Language Models (LLMs) into the SECDA ecosystem to guide design space exploration (DSE) of FPGA-based accelerators. It combines a structured DSE Explorer for generating candidate architectures with an LLM Stack that performs reasoning-guided exploration using retrieval-augmented generation and chain-of-thought prompting, coupled with a feedback loop for iterative and reinforced refinement. Building on our previous work introducing SECDA-DSE, this paper extends its evaluation by generating three accelerator designs, including element-wise vector multiplication, 2D convolution, and matrix transpose, and performing end-to-end execution on FPGA hardware. The results show that SECDA-DSE can generate SECDA-compliant accelerator designs that are successfully synthesized and executed on FPGA hardware. Furthermore, the generated designs capture kernel-specific trade-offs between compute parallelism and data movement, highlighting the potential of LLM-guided exploration to adapt architectural configurations across diverse workloads while reducing exploration time and the need for extensive human expertise.

摘要：設計基於FPGA的加速器以應對現代人工智慧工作負載需要探索一個龐大且複雜的硬體設計空間，這涉及架構參數、數據流策略和記憶體層次，使得這個過程非常耗時。雖然現有的方法論如SECDA通過SystemC模擬和FPGA執行實現了快速的硬體-軟體共同設計，但識別高效的加速器配置仍然是一個主要依賴手動過程，需要廣泛的領域知識。SECDA-DSE是一個將大型語言模型（LLMs）整合進SECDA生態系統的框架，以指導基於FPGA的加速器的設計空間探索（DSE）。它結合了一個結構化的DSE探索器，用於生成候選架構，以及一個LLM堆疊，該堆疊使用檢索增強生成和思維鏈提示進行推理引導的探索，並配合一個反饋循環以進行迭代和強化的精煉。在我們之前的工作中介紹SECDA-DSE的基礎上，本文通過生成三個加速器設計，包括元素級向量乘法、2D卷積和矩陣轉置，並在FPGA硬體上進行端到端執行，擴展了其評估。結果顯示SECDA-DSE可以生成符合SECDA標準的加速器設計，這些設計成功地在FPGA硬體上進行合成和執行。此外，生成的設計捕捉了計算並行性和數據移動之間的內核特定權衡，突顯了LLM引導探索在適應多樣工作負載的架構配置方面的潛力，同時減少探索時間和對廣泛人類專業知識的需求。

docs.title: FADA: Accessible fetal ultrasound interpretation and annotation with a selectively distilled unified vision-language model
docs.text:
2606.11106v1 by Mahmood Alzubaidi, Uzair Shah, Raden Muaz, Ines Abbes, Nader Mohammed, Abdullatif Magram, Khalid Alyafei, Mowafa Househ, Marco Agus

A global shortage of trained sonographers limits prenatal ultrasound screening in low- and middle-income countries, where over half of pregnant women receive no skilled sonography. Current deep learning approaches address detection, segmentation, or classification in isolation, each demanding a separate model and expert-specified labels at inference. We present FADA, a unified vision-language model built on Qwen3.5-VL that performs clinical interpretation, classification, detection, and segmentation through a single interpretation-first pipeline without external labels. FADA distills knowledge from four domain-specific foundation models (FetalCLIP, UltraSAM, USF-MAE, UltraFedFM) via offline pre-computed feature caching. Selective distillation, which applies feature alignment only to annotation tasks while interpretation relies on standard fine-tuning, consistently outperforms full distillation across most evaluation axes. The recommended variant, FADA-SKD, achieves 0.8820 mean Dice for segmentation, 0.7671 mAP@0.50 for detection, and 100% structured interpretation compliance. Expert sonographer validation across 237 images confirms clinically acceptable outputs in both autonomous and human-in-the-loop modes, with 73.5% of interpretations scoring perfectly under clinician guidance. The system is trainable on a single consumer GPU and deployable without cloud connectivity. We validate edge deployment by running the compressed 0.8B model on a commodity smartphone (Qualcomm Snapdragon 7 Gen 1, 12 GB RAM) using llama.cpp with GGUF quantization, completing the full 5-phase pipeline in approximately 60 seconds entirely offline. This establishes a practical pathway for integrating AI-assisted fetal assessment with portable ultrasound devices, directly addressing diagnostic access gaps in resource-constrained settings. Code, models, and data are available at https://github.com/mahmoodphd/FADA.

摘要：全球訓練有素的超聲醫生短缺限制了低收入和中等收入國家的產前超聲篩查，這些國家中有超過一半的孕婦沒有接受專業超聲檢查。當前的深度學習方法分別處理檢測、分割或分類，每個方法都需要一個單獨的模型和專家指定的標籤進行推斷。我們提出了FADA，一個基於Qwen3.5-VL的統一視覺-語言模型，通過單一的解釋優先管道執行臨床解釋、分類、檢測和分割，而不需要外部標籤。FADA通過離線預計算特徵緩存從四個特定領域的基礎模型（FetalCLIP、UltraSAM、USF-MAE、UltraFedFM）提煉知識。選擇性蒸餾僅將特徵對齊應用於標註任務，而解釋則依賴於標準微調，這在大多數評估指標上始終優於完全蒸餾。推薦變體FADA-SKD在分割中達到0.8820的平均Dice，在檢測中達到0.7671的mAP@0.50，以及100%的結構化解釋合規性。對237張圖像的專家超聲醫生驗證確認了在自主和人類參與模式下的臨床可接受輸出，其中73.5%的解釋在臨床醫生指導下得分完美。該系統可以在單個消費者GPU上進行訓練，並且可在沒有雲連接的情況下部署。我們通過在一部普通智能手機（高通Snapdragon 7 Gen 1，12 GB RAM）上運行壓縮的0.8B模型來驗證邊緣部署，使用llama.cpp進行GGUF量化，並在完全離線的情況下約60秒內完成完整的5階段管道。這為將AI輔助的胎兒評估與可攜式超聲設備整合建立了一條實用的途徑，直接解決了資源有限環境中的診斷接入差距。代碼、模型和數據可在https://github.com/mahmoodphd/FADA獲得。

docs.title: PhantomBench: Benchmarking the Non-existential Threat of Language Models
docs.text:
2606.11105v1 by Haeji Jung, Hila Gonen

Hallucinations, where language models (LMs) generate factually ungrounded responses, pose serious risks, as users tend to blindly rely on them. This is particularly concerning in high-stakes domains, where consequences of such model behavior can lead to significant harms. Despite notable progress in understanding hallucinations, it remains unclear how reliably these models can recognize the limits of their knowledge. We introduce PhantomBench, the first large-scale benchmark of its kind, comprising more than 60K non-existent terms and entities derived from real concepts across diverse domains. Using our benchmark, we evaluate a total of 21 models of various types and sizes. We show staggering hallucination rates across the board (with average rates as high as 86.7% in some cases), and note that even frontier models surprisingly fail to abstain on non-existent concepts, especially when the input presumes their existence. We then show that PhantomBench can serve as a proxy for studying model behavior on rare concepts for which models are more prone to hallucinate. We also provide a pipeline to construct PhantomBench, enabling scalable generation of non-existent concepts tailored to the specific needs of researchers and practitioners.

摘要：幻覺，即語言模型（LMs）生成事實上無根據的回應，帶來了嚴重的風險，因為用戶往往會盲目依賴它們。這在高風險領域尤其令人擔憂，因為這種模型行為的後果可能導致重大損害。儘管在理解幻覺方面取得了顯著進展，但這些模型能多可靠地識別其知識的界限仍然不清楚。我們介紹了 PhantomBench，這是首個此類的大規模基準，包含超過 60K 個不存在的術語和實體，這些術語和實體源自於不同領域的真實概念。利用我們的基準，我們評估了總共 21 種不同類型和大小的模型。我們顯示出驚人的幻覺率（在某些情況下平均高達 86.7%），並指出即使是前沿模型在面對不存在的概念時也令人驚訝地無法避免，特別是當輸入假設它們存在時。我們接著展示了 PhantomBench 可以作為研究模型在稀有概念上的行為的代理，因為模型在這些概念上更容易產生幻覺。我們還提供了一個構建 PhantomBench 的流程，能夠根據研究人員和從業者的具體需求可擴展地生成不存在的概念。

docs.title: Null-Space Constrained Low-Rank Adaptation for Response-Specified Large Language Model Unlearning
docs.text:
2606.10989v1 by Bocheng Ju, Jianhua Wang, Chengliang Liu, Xiaolin Chang

Large language model unlearning aims to suppress designated undesirable knowledge while preserving benign capabilities. Many unlearning objectives focus on suppressing undesired answers, while recent target-guided variants specify replacement behavior but still leave update locality largely unconstrained. This paper introduces \emph{Null-Space Constrained Response-Specified Unlearning} (NSRU), a projection-constrained low-rank framework for controlled LLM unlearning. NSRU uses an explicitly structured safe target response to specify the desired behavior for each forget query, while suppressing the original undesired content. To localize adaptation, NSRU estimates per-module retain subspaces from benign hidden representations and uses an orthogonal-projected low-rank parameterization to confine LoRA updates to the null space of the retain subspace. The resulting objective jointly optimizes safe-target learning, undesired-response suppression, and retention preservation under this constrained parameterization. We provide a local first-order analysis showing that the projected update reduces retain-side perturbations while preserving editable directions for shaping forget-query behavior. Experiments on TOFU show that NSRU effectively suppresses extractable forget-set knowledge while improving retain QA performance, model utility, and safe-target alignment over representative baselines. On WMDP, NSRU keeps hazardous-domain accuracy near the random-choice region while preserving broad and domain-adjacent MMLU utility. Ablation studies support the complementary roles of safe-target supervision, undesired-response suppression, retention loss, and null-space projected updates, while sensitivity and robustness analyses indicate stable behavior across the tested hyperparameter and prompt variations.

摘要：大型語言模型的去學習旨在抑制指定的不良知識，同時保留良性的能力。許多去學習目標專注於抑制不希望的答案，而最近的目標導向變體則明確指定替代行為，但仍然在更新的局部性上大致不受限制。本文介紹了\emph{Null-Space Constrained Response-Specified Unlearning}（NSRU），這是一個受限於投影的低秩框架，用於控制大型語言模型的去學習。NSRU使用明確結構的安全目標響應來指定每個遺忘查詢所需的行為，同時抑制原始的不希望內容。為了局部化適應，NSRU從良性的隱藏表示中估計每個模塊的保留子空間，並使用正交投影的低秩參數化將LoRA更新限制在保留子空間的零空間內。由此產生的目標在這一受限參數化下共同優化安全目標學習、不希望的響應抑制和保留保持。我們提供了一個局部的一階分析，顯示投影更新減少了保留側的擾動，同時保留了可編輯的方向以塑造遺忘查詢行為。在TOFU上的實驗表明，NSRU有效地抑制了可提取的遺忘集知識，同時改善了保留問答性能、模型效用和安全目標對齊，相較於代表性基準。在WMDP上，NSRU保持危險領域的準確性接近隨機選擇區域，同時保留廣泛和領域相鄰的MMLU效用。消融研究支持安全目標監督、不希望的響應抑制、保留損失和零空間投影更新的互補角色，而敏感性和穩健性分析則表明在測試的超參數和提示變化下行為穩定。

docs.title: Provenance Tracking in AI Compilers through the Lens of Coalgebra
docs.text:
2606.10937v1 by Zilu Tian, Liying Liu

AI compilers aggressively rewrite computation graphs through normalization, lowering, and optimization, making it difficult to track the provenance of tensors and operators across compilation. Reliable provenance is essential for attaching platform-specific postprocessing, debugging compiler behavior, and validating transformations, yet existing solutions are either invasive or ad hoc under non-injective graph rewrites. We present a lightweight, generative approach to provenance tracking based on observational semantics. Instead of propagating identifiers through compiler passes, we observe graph transformations and reason about provenance in terms of observable computational actions. We formalize this approach using a coalgebraic model and bisimulation, which preserves provenance even when intermediate nodes are eliminated. Furthermore, we implement this approach in a prototype AI compiler COVAN, demonstrating stable provenance across compilation pipelines with minimal engineering overhead.

摘要：AI 編譯器透過正規化、降低和優化積極重寫計算圖，這使得在編譯過程中追蹤張量和運算子的來源變得困難。可靠的來源追蹤對於附加平台特定的後處理、調試編譯器行為和驗證轉換至關重要，但現有的解決方案在非單射圖重寫下要麼是侵入性的，要麼是臨時的。 我們提出了一種基於觀察語義的輕量級生成方法來進行來源追蹤。與其在編譯器過程中傳播標識符，我們觀察圖變換並根據可觀察的計算行為推理來源。 我們使用共代數模型和雙模擬形式化了這種方法，即使在消除中間節點時也能保留來源。此外，我們在原型 AI 編譯器 COVAN 中實現了這種方法，展示了在編譯管道中以最小的工程開銷實現穩定的來源追蹤。

docs.title: Trace Only What You Need: Structure-Aware On-Demand Hypergraph Memory for Long-Document Question Answering
docs.text:
2606.10921v1 by Xiangjun Zai, Xingyu Tan, Chen Chen, Xiaoyang Wang, Wenjie Zhang

Long-document question answering (QA) requires large language models (LLMs) to reason over evidence scattered across lengthy documents, where answers often depend on event order, section-level context, and cross-part evidence connections. Although retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces the input context by retrieving relevant evidence, existing structured RAG methods still face three limitations: costly query-agnostic knowledge organization, insufficient use of original document structure, and no reuse of historical reasoning experience. To address these limitations, we propose DocTrace, a multi-agent RAG framework for long-document QA that supports query-triggered knowledge organization, document-structure-aware and experience-guided reasoning. DocTrace preserves document hierarchy with a lightweight document structural tree index, constructs agent-shared hypergraph-structured working memory on demand during reasoning, and stores successful reasoning plans in graph-structured experience memory for future reuse, enabling adaptive exploration across related long-document questions. Experiments on four long-document QA datasets show that DocTrace achieves the best performance on three datasets, surpassing the strongest baseline, ComoRAG, by up to 8.85% in F1 and 4.40% in EM, while reducing the overall computational cost by 53.32%

摘要：長文問題回答（QA）需要大型語言模型（LLMs）對散布在冗長文檔中的證據進行推理，答案通常依賴於事件順序、部分級上下文和跨部分的證據連結。儘管檢索增強生成（RAG）通過檢索相關證據來減少輸入上下文，但現有的結構化RAG方法仍面臨三個限制：昂貴的查詢無關知識組織、對原始文檔結構的使用不足以及無法重用歷史推理經驗。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了DocTrace，一個支持查詢觸發的知識組織、文檔結構感知和經驗指導推理的多代理RAG框架。DocTrace通過輕量級文檔結構樹索引保留文檔層級，根據需求在推理過程中構建代理共享的超圖結構工作記憶，並將成功的推理計劃存儲在圖結構經驗記憶中以供未來重用，從而實現對相關長文檔問題的自適應探索。在四個長文檔QA數據集上的實驗表明，DocTrace在三個數據集上達到了最佳性能，F1指標超過最強基準ComoRAG達8.85%，EM指標達4.40%，同時將整體計算成本降低了53.32%。

docs.title: Large-scale semantic mapping of learner agency and autonomy reveals what measurement and generative AI research overlook
docs.text:
2606.10881v1 by Fei Qin, Xiaobo Liu, Yaowen Zhang, Xuming Li, Fei Wang, Mutlu Cukurova, Jingjing Chen, Yu Zhang

Learner agency and autonomy are foundational to personal development, yet a pervasive "jingle-jangle" fallacy (i.e. identical terms denoting different constructs, distinct terms denoting identical ones) has substantially hindered cumulative knowledge. Treating meaning as a phenomenon constituted through use in linguistic practice, we extracted 8,954 definitions and 2,700 scale items from over 14,000 publications, to investigate how researchers actually used learner agency and autonomy with a semantic analysis pipeline. The definitional landscape of two constructs resolves into three dimensions: regulation and control of learning (task), intrinsic motivation and internal decision-making (person), and social-relational action (sociocultural), thereby empirically quantifying the jingle-jangle fallacy. Existing scales, however, systematically underrepresent the sociocultural dimension. Critically, current generative AI research in education concentrates on learning regulation and control, narrowing the behavioral repertoire that AI-mediated learning environments are designed to cultivate. Beyond conceptual clarification, this work carries direct implications for conceptualization, measurement, and practice towards supporting the multidimensional learner agency and autonomy.

摘要：學習者的能動性和自主性是個人發展的基礎，然而普遍存在的「叮噹-搖鈴」謬誤（即相同的術語表示不同的構念，不同的術語表示相同的構念）實質上阻礙了累積知識。將意義視為通過語言實踐中的使用構成的現象，我們從超過14,000篇出版物中提取了8,954個定義和2,700個量表項目，以調查研究者實際上如何使用學習者的能動性和自主性，並進行語義分析。這兩個構念的定義景觀分解為三個維度：學習的調節和控制（任務）、內在動機和內部決策（個人）以及社會關係行動（社會文化），從而實證量化了叮噹-搖鈴謬誤。然而，現有的量表系統性地低估了社會文化維度。關鍵是，目前在教育領域的生成性人工智慧研究集中於學習的調節和控制，縮小了人工智慧介導的學習環境所設計的行為範疇。除了概念澄清，這項工作對於支持多維度的學習者能動性和自主性在概念化、測量和實踐方面具有直接的影響。

docs.title: Pushing the Limits of LLM Tool Calling via Experiential Knowledge Integration and Activation
docs.text:
2606.10875v1 by Yupu Hao, Zhuoran Jin, Huanxuan Liao, Kang Liu, Jun Zhao

Large language models (LLMs) rely on tool use to act as autonomous agents, yet often fail in multi-step execution due to insufficient tool-related knowledge and ineffective knowledge activation. Therefore, we present a systematic study on how knowledge influences tool-use performance, covering the stages of knowledge acquisition, activation, and internalization. In the knowledge acquisition stage, we acquire and evaluate various forms of experiential knowledge, and our analysis shows that simple instance-level knowledge can already provide strong and reliable gains, while abstract intent-level knowledge offers limited benefits. At inference time, to activate knowledge, we find that prompting LLM to expand the depth of reasoning yields diminishing returns, whereas expanding the width of reasoning by parallel sampling with aggregation more effectively activates latent experiential knowledge. At training time, for knowledge internalization, post-training with knowledge-augmented data further improves performance, with reinforcement learning outperforming supervised fine-tuning. Based on these insights, we propose the Knowledge-Augmented Tool Execution (KATE), a knowledge-augmented tool execution framework that integrates experiential knowledge with reasoning-width-expanded inference and knowledge-aware training. Experiments on BFCL-V3 and AppWorld demonstrate consistent and substantial improvements over strong baselines across model scales. Our Code is available at https://github.com/hypasd-art/KATE.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）依賴工具使用來作為自主代理，但由於工具相關知識不足和知識激活不有效，常常在多步執行中失敗。因此，我們提出了一項系統性研究，探討知識如何影響工具使用表現，涵蓋知識獲取、激活和內化的階段。在知識獲取階段，我們獲取並評估各種形式的經驗知識，我們的分析顯示，簡單的實例級知識已經能提供強大且可靠的增益，而抽象的意圖級知識則提供有限的好處。在推理時，為了激活知識，我們發現提示LLM擴展推理的深度會產生遞減的回報，而通過平行取樣和聚合擴展推理的寬度則更有效地激活潛在的經驗知識。在訓練時，為了知識內化，使用增強知識的數據進行後訓練進一步提高了性能，強化學習的表現超過了監督微調。基於這些見解，我們提出了知識增強工具執行（KATE），這是一個將經驗知識與推理寬度擴展的推理和知識感知訓練相結合的知識增強工具執行框架。在BFCL-V3和AppWorld上的實驗顯示，在各模型規模上，相較於強基線有一致且顯著的改進。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/hypasd-art/KATE 獲得。

docs.title: Attention-Discounted Adaptive Sampler for Masked Diffusion Language Models
docs.text:
2606.10829v1 by Yusuf Sahin, Ahmed Rockey Saikia, Volkan Cevher, Paolo Favaro

Masked diffusion language models can reduce inference steps by revealing multiple tokens per denoising iteration, but this parallelism is fragile: positions that are individually confident may be unsafe to commit together when their predictions are coupled. Existing training-free samplers such as Top-(k), Fast-dLLM, and EB-Sampler mainly control how many tokens to reveal, while often ranking candidates by token-wise scores that ignore interactions within the selected set. We propose ADAS, a training-free reranking rule for parallel masked diffusion decoding. ADAS leaves the base sampler's stopping rule unchanged and modifies only subset construction: it greedily discounts a candidate when it attends strongly to already selected positions whose predictions remain uncertain. Unlike graph-constrained methods that turn attention into hard compatibility constraints, ADAS keeps attention continuous and uses it as a soft marginal penalty. Across LLaDA-8B-Base and Dream-7B-Base on GSM8K, MATH500, HumanEval, and MBPP, plugging ADAS into Top-(k), Fast-dLLM, and EB-Sampler improves low-NFE performance at matched denoiser evaluations by (9.11) and (10.46) percentage points on average, respectively, with (3.1\%) per-forward runtime overhead. These results show that soft attention-discounted reranking is a simple and modular way to improve quality in highly parallel decoding for masked diffusion language models.

摘要：被遮蔽的擴散語言模型可以通過每次去噪迭代揭示多個標記來減少推理步驟，但這種並行性是脆弱的：當它們的預測相互關聯時，單獨自信的位置可能不安全一起提交。現有的無需訓練的取樣器，如 Top-(k)、Fast-dLLM 和 EB-Sampler 主要控制揭示多少標記，同時通常根據忽略所選集合內部互動的標記分數來排名候選者。我們提出了 ADAS，一種用於並行遮蔽擴散解碼的無需訓練的重新排名規則。ADAS 保持基礎取樣器的停止規則不變，僅修改子集構建：當候選者強烈關注於預測仍然不確定的已選位置時，它會貪婪地折扣該候選者。與將注意力轉化為硬兼容性約束的圖約束方法不同，ADAS 保持注意力的連續性，並將其用作軟邊際懲罰。在 GSM8K、MATH500、HumanEval 和 MBPP 上的 LLaDA-8B-Base 和 Dream-7B-Base 中，將 ADAS 插入 Top-(k)、Fast-dLLM 和 EB-Sampler，平均提高了在匹配去噪器評估中的低 NFE 性能 (9.11) 和 (10.46) 個百分點，並且每次前向運行的開銷為 (3.1\%)。這些結果顯示，軟注意力折扣重新排名是一種簡單且模塊化的方式，可以提高遮蔽擴散語言模型的高並行解碼質量。

docs.title: Earth-OneVision: Extending Remote Sensing Multimodal Large Language Models to More Sensor Modalities and Tasks
docs.text:
2606.10819v1 by Miaoxin Cai, Guanqun Wang, Wei Zhang, Guangyao Zhou, Yin Zhuang, Tong Zhang, Hao Wang, He Chen, Jun Li

RS-MLLMs enable natural-language understanding and spatial reasoning over earth observation imagery. However, existing models support only a narrow range of sensor types and tasks, yielding a fragmented view of the earth and leaving cross-modal geoscientific knowledge largely unexploited. This work presents Earth-OneVision, a 2B RS-MLLM that unifies six sensor modalities (i.e., optical, SAR, infrared, multispectral, temporal, and video) and cross-sensor fusion across 9 task categories within a single autoregressive framework. Three dedicated mechanisms address three bottlenecks. Full-Granularity Vision-Language Alignment (FGVLA) aligns multi-level visual features with the multi-dimensional language space. Spatial-Linguistic Isomorphic Serialization (SLIS) unifies heterogeneous spatial outputs as autoregressive tokens. Progressive Cross-Modality Adaptation (PCMA) decomposes the compound domain gap into sequential stages, tackling the viewpoint and imaging physics gaps in turn. To support joint training, MMRS-OneVision is constructed with ~34M QA pairs spanning all six sensor modalities and cross-sensor fusion across 9 task categories, substantially exceeding existing RS multimodal instruction datasets. With only 2B parameters, Earth-OneVision achieves competitive or state-of-the-art results across extensive benchmarks, consistently matching or outperforming 4B-72B RS-MLLMs. It achieves 87.52% P@0.5 on the OPT-RSVG testset for optical visual grounding and 80.68% on the SAR VQA benchmark SARLANG-Bench, exceeding 7B models by over 7%. It further achieves 75.74% recall on the BigEarthNet-MS testset for multispectral classification, and 81.94% MCQ accuracy on EarthMind-Bench for cross-modality reasoning.

摘要：RS-MLLMs 使自然語言理解和空間推理能夠應用於地球觀測影像。然而，現有模型僅支持有限範圍的傳感器類型和任務，導致對地球的觀察呈現出片段化的視角，並使跨模態地球科學知識大部分未被利用。本研究提出了 Earth-OneVision，一個 2B RS-MLLM，統一了六種傳感器模態（即光學、SAR、紅外線、多光譜、時間和視頻）以及在單一自回歸框架內的跨傳感器融合，涵蓋 9 個任務類別。三個專門的機制解決了三個瓶頸。全粒度視覺-語言對齊（FGVLA）將多層次的視覺特徵與多維語言空間對齊。空間-語言同構序列化（SLIS）將異質的空間輸出統一為自回歸標記。漸進式跨模態適應（PCMA）將複合領域差距分解為連續階段，依次解決視角和成像物理差距。為了支持聯合訓練，MMRS-OneVision 構建了約 3400 萬 QA 對，涵蓋所有六種傳感器模態及 9 個任務類別的跨傳感器融合，顯著超過現有的 RS 多模態指令數據集。僅用 2B 參數，Earth-OneVision 在廣泛的基準測試中達到了競爭性或最先進的結果，始終與 4B-72B RS-MLLMs 相匹配或超越。在 OPT-RSVG 測試集上，其光學視覺定位達到 87.52% P@0.5，而在 SAR VQA 基準 SARLANG-Bench 上達到 80.68%，超過 7B 模型超過 7%。此外，在 BigEarthNet-MS 測試集上，其多光譜分類的召回率達到 75.74%，在 EarthMind-Bench 上的跨模態推理中達到 81.94% 的 MCQ 準確率。

docs.title: Boosting ECG Classification Performance by Pre-training with Synthesized Data
docs.text:
2606.10802v1 by Naoki Nonaka, Jun Seita

Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) typically require extensive datasets for effective training. In the medical domain, acquiring large-scale data is often challenging due to privacy concerns and the rarity of certain diseases. To address this data scarcity, we investigate the efficacy of training DNN models using synthetic data, generated based on domain-specific medical knowledge. Specifically, we develop a knowledge-driven Gaussian-composition synthesis algorithm for single-lead II ECGs, in which each heartbeat is represented by Gaussian-shaped P, Q, R, S, and T wave components. Using this simulator, we generate synthetic data for four abnormal electrocardiogram (ECG) classes: atrial fibrillation (AF), atrial flutter (AFLT), premature ventricular complex (PVC), and Wolff-Parkinson-White Syndrome (WPW). We evaluate the utility of this synthetic data by conducting abnormal ECG classification using ten different DNN architectures. Our results demonstrate that synthetic-to-real training improves classification performance for three of the four target abnormalities, with the largest architecture-averaged gain of $33.2\%$ observed for AFLT. Further analysis reveals that the performance enhancement from synthetic data is more pronounced with smaller real-world datasets. These findings suggest that domain-knowledge-based synthetic ECGs can serve as a useful pre-training resource, particularly in scenarios where real-world data are limited or difficult to obtain.

摘要：深度神經網絡（DNNs）通常需要大量數據集以進行有效的訓練。在醫療領域，由於隱私問題和某些疾病的稀有性，獲取大規模數據往往具有挑戰性。為了解決這一數據稀缺問題，我們研究了使用基於特定領域醫療知識生成的合成數據來訓練DNN模型的有效性。具體而言，我們為單導聯II型心電圖（ECG）開發了一種基於知識驅動的高斯組合合成算法，其中每一次心跳由高斯形狀的P、Q、R、S和T波組件表示。利用這個模擬器，我們為四種異常心電圖（ECG）類別生成合成數據：心房顫動（AF）、心房撲動（AFLT）、早期心室複雜（PVC）和沃爾夫-帕金森-懷特綜合症（WPW）。我們通過使用十種不同的DNN架構進行異常ECG分類來評估這些合成數據的實用性。我們的結果顯示，合成到真實的訓練提高了四種目標異常中三種的分類性能，其中AFLT的架構平均增益最大，達到$33.2\%$。進一步分析顯示，合成數據帶來的性能提升在較小的真實世界數據集上更為明顯。這些發現表明，基於領域知識的合成ECG可以作為有用的預訓練資源，特別是在真實數據有限或難以獲得的情況下。

docs.title: A Bayesian Network Approach for Enhancing Security-Focused Decision Support Systems
docs.text:
2606.10782v1 by Carolina Fernández-Martínez, Shuaib Siddiqui, Vanesa Daza

The adoption and integration of heterogeneous stacks in most of today's open-source based networks brings clear benefits like interoperability and availability of advanced features. Yet, on the other hand the increasing number of interconnecting components and moving parts requires maintaining an ever increasing base of interdisciplinary knowledge of different tools in different domains to ensure proper operation. To alleviate such efforts, this work proposes a Decision Support System (DSS) to guide infrastructure operators through the selection of security approaches (e.g. tools) to adopt in their environments. This framework easily captures the end-user high-level requirements on the security triad for different domains and runs inference on the designated models to provide the identified tools (security mechanisms) that better serve such needs. The presented DSS aims at delivering an understandable and extensible framework to accommodate varying requirements and Bayesian Network (BN) models. The architecture and modelling of the system are proposed, aligned with its theoretical framework. Its performance is evaluated in terms of time and prediction accuracy.

摘要：當今大多數基於開源的網絡中，異質堆疊的採用和整合帶來了明顯的好處，如互操作性和先進功能的可用性。然而，另一方面，越來越多的互連組件和運行部件需要維護不斷增加的跨學科知識基礎，以確保不同領域中不同工具的正常運作。為了減輕這種努力，本研究提出了一個決策支持系統（DSS），以指導基礎設施運營商選擇在其環境中採用的安全方法（例如工具）。該框架輕鬆捕捉終端用戶對不同領域安全三角的高級需求，並對指定模型進行推斷，以提供更好滿足這些需求的識別工具（安全機制）。所提出的DSS旨在提供一個可理解且可擴展的框架，以適應不同的需求和貝葉斯網絡（BN）模型。系統的架構和建模被提出，與其理論框架保持一致。其性能在時間和預測準確性方面進行了評估。

docs.title: Recovering the Zipfian Distribution in Unsupervised Term Discovery
docs.text:
2606.10781v1 by Danel Slabbert, Simon Malan, Herman Kamper

Unsupervised term discovery involves segmenting unlabelled speech into word- or syllable-like units and clustering these into a lexicon of candidate types. True lexicons follow a Zipfian distribution, yet the dominant centre-based clustering approach -- K-means -- produces a more uniform distribution due to an inductive bias toward spherical clusters. In this paper we revisit graph-based clustering as a bottom-up alternative, where segment embeddings are connected by pairwise similarity and partitioned using the Leiden algorithm. We show that graph clustering substantially outperforms centre-based approaches (K-means, GMM, BIRCH) in both word- and syllable-level lexicon discovery across three languages, producing more Zipf-like distributions. Another bottom-up approach, agglomerative clustering with average linkage, also performs well, although it is computationally less efficient and allows for less control over the resulting distribution. Our work calls into question the dominance of centre-based clustering for term discovery, and promotes graph clustering as an attractive alternative.

摘要：無監督的術語發現涉及將未標記的語音分割成類似單詞或音節的單位，並將這些單位聚類成候選類型的詞彙表。真正的詞彙表遵循齊夫分佈，然而主導的基於中心的聚類方法——K-means——由於對球形聚類的歸納偏見，產生了更均勻的分佈。在本文中，我們重新審視基於圖的聚類作為一種自下而上的替代方法，其中段落嵌入通過成對相似性連接，並使用Leiden算法進行劃分。我們顯示圖聚類在三種語言的單詞和音節級詞彙發現中，顯著優於基於中心的方法（K-means、GMM、BIRCH），產生了更接近齊夫分佈的結果。另一種自下而上的方法，即使用平均連接的聚合聚類，也表現良好，儘管它在計算上效率較低，並且對最終分佈的控制較少。我們的工作質疑了基於中心的聚類在術語發現中的主導地位，並推廣圖聚類作為一種有吸引力的替代方案。

docs.title: Detecting Knowledge Gaps from Conversational AI Interactions Using Curriculum Prerequisite Graphs
docs.text:
2606.10736v1 by Youssef Medhat, Junsoo Park, Ploy Thajchayapong, Ashok K. Goel

Large online courses generate thousands of student questions directed at conversational AI teaching assistants, yet these interaction logs remain largely untapped as diagnostic signals. We present a pipeline that maps student questions from a conversational AI teaching assistant to curriculum topics using a few-shot text classifier, grounded in a GPT-4-extracted prerequisite knowledge graph of course concepts. Evaluated on 1,340 question events from 164 students in a graduate-level AI course, our classifier achieves 80.0% accuracy across 43 labels (42 curriculum topics plus an "unknown" abstention class). Topic-level question volume correlates significantly with student self-reported difficulty from an independent mid-semester survey (rho = 0.491, p = 0.008, n = 28 topics), providing convergent evidence that the classified question stream reflects genuine topic difficulty. These results demonstrate that conversational AI interaction logs, mapped onto curriculum structure, carry actionable signals about topic-level knowledge gaps and provide instructors with a curriculum-grounded view of which topics warrant attention.

摘要：大型線上課程產生數以千計的學生問題，這些問題針對對話式AI教學助理，但這些互動記錄在診斷信號上仍然未被充分利用。我們提出了一個管道，將對話式AI教學助理的學生問題映射到課程主題，使用基於GPT-4提取的課程概念前置知識圖的少量示例文本分類器。在對164名研究生AI課程學生的1,340個問題事件進行評估時，我們的分類器在43個標籤（42個課程主題加上一個“未知”棄權類別）上達到80.0%的準確率。主題級問題量與學生在獨立的學期中期調查中自報的難度顯著相關（rho = 0.491，p = 0.008，n = 28個主題），提供了收斂證據，表明分類後的問題流反映了真實的主題難度。這些結果表明，映射到課程結構的對話式AI互動記錄，帶有關於主題級知識差距的可行信號，並為教師提供了基於課程的視角，了解哪些主題值得關注。

docs.title: Abstracts
EvoArena: Tracking Memory Evolution for Robust LLM Agents in Dynamic Environments
docs.text:
2606.13681v1 by Jundong Xu, Qingchuan Li, Jiaying Wu, Yihuai Lan, Shuyue Stella Li, Huichi Zhou, Bowen Jiang, Lei Wang, Jun Wang, Anh Tuan Luu, Caiming Xiong, Hae Won Park, Bryan Hooi, Zhiyuan Hu

Large language model (LLM) agents have achieved strong performance on a wide range of benchmarks, yet most evaluations assume static environments. In contrast, real-world deployment is inherently dynamic, requiring agents to continually align their knowledge, skills, and behavior with changing environments and updated task conditions. To address this gap, we introduce EvoArena, a benchmark suite that models environment changes as sequences of progressive updates across terminal, software, and social domains. We further propose EvoMem, a patch-based memory paradigm that records memory evolution as structured update histories, enabling agents to reason about environmental evolution through changes in their memory. Experiments show that current agents struggle on EvoArena, achieving an average accuracy of 39.6% across evolving terminal, software, and social-preference domains. EvoMem consistently improves performance, yielding an average gain of 1.5% on EvoArena and also improving standard benchmarks such as GAIA and LoCoMo by 6.1% and 4.8%. Beyond individual tasks, EvoMem further improves chain-level accuracy by 3.7% on EvoArena, where success requires completing a consecutive sequence of related evolutionary subtasks. Mechanistic analysis shows that EvoMem improves evidence capture in the memory, indicating better preservation of complete evolving environment states. Our results highlight the importance of modeling evolution in both evaluation and memory for reliable agent deployment.

摘要：大型語言模型 (LLM) 代理在廣泛的基準測試中取得了強勁的表現，但大多數評估假設環境是靜態的。相較之下，現實世界的部署本質上是動態的，這要求代理不斷調整其知識、技能和行為，以適應不斷變化的環境和更新的任務條件。為了解決這一差距，我們介紹了 EvoArena，一個基準套件，將環境變化建模為終端、軟體和社會領域的漸進更新序列。我們進一步提出了 EvoMem，一種基於補丁的記憶範式，將記憶演變記錄為結構化的更新歷史，使代理能夠通過記憶中的變化推理環境的演變。實驗顯示，目前的代理在 EvoArena 上表現不佳，在不斷演變的終端、軟體和社會偏好領域中平均準確率僅為 39.6%。EvoMem 持續改善性能，在 EvoArena 上平均提升 1.5%，並且在 GAIA 和 LoCoMo 等標準基準上分別提升 6.1% 和 4.8%。除了單獨任務外，EvoMem 還在 EvoArena 上進一步提高了鏈級準確率 3.7%，在這裡成功需要完成一系列相關的演變子任務。機制分析顯示，EvoMem 改善了記憶中的證據捕捉，表明對完整演變環境狀態的更好保存。我們的結果突顯了在評估和記憶中建模演變對於可靠代理部署的重要性。

docs.title: Learning to Reason by Analogy via Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
docs.text:
2606.13680v1 by Zilin Xiao, Qi Ma, Chun-cheng Jason Chen, Xintao Chen, Avinash Atreya, Hanjie Chen, Vicente Ordonez

Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has become a standard mechanism for grounding language models in external knowledge, yet conventional retrieval based on lexical or semantic similarity is poorly suited for complex reasoning tasks: a semantically similar problem may demand an entirely different solution strategy, while a superficially different problem may share the same underlying reasoning pattern. We propose Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RA-RFT), a post-training framework that teaches language models to reason by analogy. RA-RFT uses gold-relevance distillation to train a retriever that ranks contexts by expected reasoning benefit rather than semantic overlap, and then fine-tunes the policy model via reinforcement fine-tuning methods with retrieved analogous demonstrations, so the model learns to leverage reasoning traces under verifiable outcome rewards. We further analyze the diversity of retrieved contexts and find that reasoning-aware retrieval surfaces complementary solution strategies that provide distinct reasoning scaffolds for individual problems. Across challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks, RA-RFT consistently outperforms standard reinforcement fine-tuning methods. For example, it improves AIME 2025 average@32 accuracy by 7.1 and 2.8 points over GRPO for Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-4B respectively -- suggesting that reasoning-aware retrieval is a complementary axis of improvement and orthogonal to advances in reward design or training curricula.

摘要：檢索增強生成（RAG）已成為將語言模型與外部知識結合的標準機制，然而，基於詞彙或語義相似性的傳統檢索對於複雜推理任務並不適合：一個語義上相似的問題可能需要完全不同的解決策略，而一個表面上不同的問題可能共享相同的基本推理模式。我們提出了檢索增強強化微調（RA-RFT），這是一個後訓練框架，旨在教導語言模型通過類比進行推理。RA-RFT使用金標相關性蒸餾來訓練一個檢索器，該檢索器根據預期的推理收益而非語義重疊來對上下文進行排名，然後通過強化微調方法利用檢索到的類似示範來微調策略模型，使模型學會在可驗證的結果獎勵下利用推理痕跡。我們進一步分析了檢索到的上下文的多樣性，發現具有推理意識的檢索能夠呈現互補的解決策略，為個別問題提供不同的推理支架。在具有挑戰性的數學推理基準中，RA-RFT始終超越標準的強化微調方法。例如，它在AIME 2025 average@32的準確率上分別比GRPO提高了7.1和2.8個點，針對Qwen3-1.7B和Qwen3-4B -- 這表明具有推理意識的檢索是一個互補的改進軸，與獎勵設計或訓練課程的進展是正交的。

docs.title: SpatialClaw: Rethinking Action Interface for Agentic Spatial Reasoning
docs.text:
2606.13673v1 by Seokju Cho, Ryo Hachiuma, Abhishek Badki, Hang Su, Byung-Kwan Lee, Chan Hee Song, Sifei Liu, Subhashree Radhakrishnan, Seungryong Kim, Yu-Chiang Frank Wang, Min-Hung Chen

Spatial reasoning, the ability to determine where objects are, how they relate, and how they move in 3D, remains a fundamental challenge for vision-language models (VLMs). Tool-augmented agents attempt to address this by augmenting VLMs with specialist perception modules, yet their effectiveness is bounded by the action interface through which those tools are invoked. In this work, we study how the design of this interface shapes the agent's capacity for open-ended spatial reasoning. Existing spatial agents either employ single-pass code execution, which commits to a full analysis strategy before any intermediate result is observed, or rely on a structured tool-call interface that often offers less flexibility for freely composing operations or tailoring the analysis to each task. Both designs offer limited flexibility for open-ended, complex 3D/4D spatial reasoning. We therefore propose SpatialClaw, a training-free framework for spatial reasoning that adopts code as the action interface. SpatialClaw maintains a stateful Python kernel pre-loaded with input frames and a suite of perception and geometry primitives, letting a VLM-backed agent write one executable cell per step conditioned on all prior outputs, enabling the agent to flexibly compose and manipulate perception results and adapt its analysis to both intermediate text and visual observations and the demands of each problem. Evaluated across 20 spatial reasoning benchmarks spanning a broad range of static and dynamic 3D/4D spatial reasoning tasks, SpatialClaw achieves 59.9% average accuracy, outperforming the recent spatial agent by +11.2 points, with consistent gains across six VLM backbones from two model families without any benchmark- or model-specific adaptation.

摘要：空間推理，即確定物體位置、它們之間的關係以及它們在三維空間中的運動的能力，對於視覺-語言模型（VLMs）來說仍然是一個根本挑戰。工具增強代理試圖通過用專業的感知模塊增強VLM來解決這個問題，但它們的有效性受到通過這些工具調用的行動介面的限制。在這項工作中，我們研究這個介面的設計如何塑造代理進行開放式空間推理的能力。現有的空間代理要麼使用單次執行代碼，這在觀察到任何中間結果之前就承諾了完整的分析策略，要麼依賴於結構化的工具調用介面，這通常對自由組合操作或根據每個任務量身定制分析提供了較少的靈活性。這兩種設計對於開放式的複雜3D/4D空間推理提供的靈活性有限。因此，我們提出了SpatialClaw，一個無需訓練的空間推理框架，採用代碼作為行動介面。SpatialClaw維持一個狀態保持的Python內核，預加載輸入幀和一套感知及幾何原語，讓一個基於VLM的代理在每一步根據所有先前的輸出寫出一個可執行單元，從而使代理能夠靈活地組合和操作感知結果，並根據中間文本和視覺觀察以及每個問題的需求調整其分析。在涵蓋廣泛靜態和動態3D/4D空間推理任務的20個空間推理基準上進行評估，SpatialClaw實現了59.9%的平均準確率，超越了最近的空間代理11.2個百分點，並在來自兩個模型系列的六個VLM骨幹上持續獲得增益，無需任何基準或模型特定的調整。

docs.title: Automated reproducibility assessments in the social and behavioral sciences using large language models
docs.text:
2606.13670v1 by Tobias Holtdirk, Pietro Marcolongo, Anna Steinberg Schulten, Felix Henninger, Stefan Rose, Sarah Ball, Bolei Ma, Frauke Kreuter, Markus Weinmann, Stefan Feuerriegel

Reproducibility in the social and behavioral sciences is typically evaluated by independent researchers who reanalyze the original data to assess whether the published findings can be recovered. However, such approaches are resource-intensive and difficult to scale. Here, we show that large language models (LLMs) can automate reproducibility assessments. Using N=76 published studies with predefined claims from the behavioral and social sciences, we compare LLM-generated analysis with the original findings and human reanalysis. For 7 studies, the LLM could not produce a viable effect size estimate. For the remaining studies, our LLM pipeline recovered the original effect sizes in 41% of studies using a +/-0.05 tolerance in Cohen's d. Further, our LLM pipeline reached the same qualitative conclusion as the original study in 96% of cases, where conclusions indicate whether the reanalysis supports the original claim. For comparison, human reanalysts recovered the original effect sizes in 34% of studies and reached the same qualitative conclusion in 74% of cases. Together, these results show that LLMs can serve as a scalable tool for automated reproducibility assessment and provide a foundation for systematic auditing of empirical results in the social and behavioral sciences.

摘要：社會科學和行為科學中的可重複性通常由獨立研究者進行評估，他們重新分析原始數據以評估已發表的研究結果是否可以重現。然而，這種方法資源密集且難以擴展。在這裡，我們展示了大型語言模型（LLMs）可以自動化可重複性評估。使用N=76項來自行為和社會科學的已發表研究及其預定主張，我們將LLM生成的分析與原始發現和人類重新分析進行比較。對於7項研究，LLM無法產生可行的效應大小估計。對於其餘的研究，我們的LLM管道在41%的研究中使用±0.05的容忍度恢復了原始效應大小。此外，我們的LLM管道在96%的案例中達到了與原始研究相同的定性結論，其中結論指示重新分析是否支持原始主張。作為比較，人類重新分析者在34%的研究中恢復了原始效應大小，並在74%的案例中達到了相同的定性結論。總體而言，這些結果表明LLMs可以作為自動化可重複性評估的可擴展工具，並為社會科學和行為科學中實證結果的系統審核提供基礎。

docs.title: Agents-K1: Towards Agent-native Knowledge Orchestration
docs.text:
2606.13669v1 by Zongsheng Cao, Bihao Zhan, Jinxin Shi, Jiong Wang, Fangchen Yu, Zhijie Zhong, Zijie Guo, Tianshuo Peng, Zhuo Liu, Yi Xie, Xiang Zhuang, Yue Fan, Runmin Ma, Shiyang Feng, Xiangchao Yan, Anran Liu, Peng Ye, Wenlong Zhang, Shufei Zhang, Chunfeng Song, Fenghua Ling, Jie Zhou, Liang He, Bo Zhang, Lei Bai

Current LLM-based research agents have advanced through agent orchestration, yet largely overlook scientific knowledge orchestration. Existing works often reduce papers to abstracts, surface mentions, and flat \texttt{cites} edges, omitting key entities, claims, evidence, mechanisms, and method lineages essential for scientific reasoning. To this end, we introduce \textbf{Agents-K1}, an end-to-end knowledge orchestration pipeline that converts raw documents into agent-native scientific knowledge graphs. Agents-K1 integrates three components under a unifying theoretical foundation: a multimodal parser whose five-module schema captures entities, multimodal evidence, citations, and typed inter-entity relations across the full paper rather than abstracts alone; a 4B information-extraction backbone trained with GRPO under a rule-based reward; and a graphanything CLI, a tri-source agent interface that unifies web search, multimodal graph retrieval, and cross-document traversal. On top of this, we process 2.46 million scientific papers across six subjects to produce \textbf{Scholar-KG}, of which we release a one-million-paper subset, and the full Scholar-KG is accessible via the SCP link below. The same pipeline can be extended to general-domain corpora and to schema-conformant data synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Agents-K1 achieves superior performance in scientific information extraction, knowledge graph construction, and multi-hop scientific reasoning.

摘要：目前基於LLM的研究代理已通過代理協調取得進展，但在很大程度上忽視了科學知識的協調。現有的研究作品通常將論文簡化為摘要、表面提及和扁平的 \texttt{cites} 邊緣，忽略了對於科學推理至關重要的關鍵實體、主張、證據、機制和方法沿革。為此，我們推出了 \textbf{Agents-K1}，這是一個端到端的知識協調管道，將原始文檔轉換為代理原生的科學知識圖。Agents-K1 在一個統一的理論基礎下整合了三個組件：一個多模態解析器，其五模塊架構捕捉全篇論文中的實體、多模態證據、引用和類型化的實體間關係，而不僅僅是摘要；一個在基於規則的獎勵下使用GRPO訓練的4B信息提取骨幹；以及一個graphanything CLI，這是一個三源代理接口，統一了網絡搜索、多模態圖檢索和跨文檔遍歷。在此基礎上，我們處理了246萬篇科學論文，涵蓋六個學科，生成了 \textbf{Scholar-KG}，我們釋放了一百萬篇論文的子集，完整的Scholar-KG可通過以下SCP鏈接訪問。同樣的管道可以擴展到通用領域的語料庫和符合架構的數據合成。大量實驗表明，Agents-K1在科學信息提取、知識圖構建和多跳科學推理方面實現了卓越的性能。

docs.title: Influcoder: Distilling Decoders' Gradient Influence Rankings into an Encoder for Data Attribution
docs.text:
2606.13668v1 by Dimitri Kachler, Damien Sileo, Pascal Denis

With the growth of LLMs' (Large Language Models) capabilities, there has been an increasing push to curate high quality datasets by filtering samples in the training data. In general, Data Attribution (DA) methods aim to estimate how individual samples in a training dataset can precondition a model to generate certain outputs. As an example, one might be interested in which samples in the data could be the source of toxic behavior after training the LLM. Many methods quantify this conditioning through the paradigm of influence functions. While methods of this family are effective in its function, they lack the necessary processing speed and storage compactness to be practically implemented on large datasets. We propose a method, Influcoder, as a quick and cost-effective approach to influence-based Data Attribution at scale.

摘要：隨著大型語言模型（LLMs）能力的增長，對於通過過濾訓練數據中的樣本來策劃高質量數據集的推動也在不斷增加。一般來說，數據歸因（DA）方法旨在估計訓練數據集中個別樣本如何使模型預先條件化以生成某些輸出。例如，人們可能會對哪些數據樣本在訓練LLM後可能成為有毒行為的來源感興趣。許多方法通過影響函數的範式來量化這種條件化。雖然這類方法在功能上是有效的，但它們缺乏必要的處理速度和存儲緊湊性，無法在大型數據集上實際應用。我們提出了一種方法，Influcoder，作為一種快速且具成本效益的影響基數據歸因方法，適用於大規模應用。

docs.title: HyperTool: Beyond Step-Wise Tool Calls for Tool-Augmented Agents
docs.text:
2606.13663v1 by Yaxin Du, Yifan Zhou, Yujie Ge, Jiajun Wang, Xianghe Pang, Shuo Tang, Tuney Zheng, Bryan Dai, Jian Yang, Siheng Chen

Tool-augmented LLM agents commonly rely on step-wise atomic tool calls, where each invocation, observation, and value transfer is exposed in the main reasoning trace. This creates an \emph{execution-granularity mismatch}: locally deterministic tool workflows are unfolded into repeated model-visible decisions, consuming context and forcing the model to manage low-level dataflow in the trace. We introduce \textbf{HyperTool}, a unified executable MCP-style tool interface that changes the model-visible unit of tool execution. A model invokes HyperTool with a code block that can call existing tools through their original schemas, manipulate returned values, and pass intermediate results locally, folding deterministic tool subroutines into a single outer call. To train models to use this interface, we synthesize HyperTool-format trajectories from cross-tool compositional tasks and verify them in real MCP environments. On MCP-Universe, HyperTool improves average accuracy from 15.69\% to 35.29\% on Qwen3-32B and from 9.93\% to 33.33\% on Qwen3-8B, and surpass GPT-OSS and Kimi-k2.5 on average accuracy, showing that our HyperTool can substantially improve multi-step tool use.

摘要：工具增強的 LLM 代理通常依賴於逐步的原子工具調用，其中每次調用、觀察和數值傳輸都在主要推理痕跡中顯示出來。這造成了一種 \emph{執行粒度不匹配}：局部確定性的工具工作流程被展開為重複的模型可見決策，消耗上下文並迫使模型在痕跡中管理低級數據流。我們引入了 \textbf{HyperTool}，這是一個統一的可執行 MCP 風格工具介面，改變了工具執行的模型可見單位。模型通過一個代碼塊調用 HyperTool，該代碼塊可以通過其原始模式調用現有工具，操縱返回的值，並在本地傳遞中間結果，將確定性的工具子程序折疊為單個外部調用。為了訓練模型使用這個介面，我們從跨工具組合任務合成 HyperTool 格式的軌跡，並在真實的 MCP 環境中驗證它們。在 MCP-Universe 上，HyperTool 將 Qwen3-32B 的平均準確率從 15.69\% 提高到 35.29\%，將 Qwen3-8B 的平均準確率從 9.93\% 提高到 33.33\%，並在平均準確率上超越 GPT-OSS 和 Kimi-k2.5，顯示出我們的 HyperTool 可以顯著改善多步工具的使用。

docs.title: EurekAgent: Agent Environment Engineering is All You Need For Autonomous Scientific Discovery
docs.text:
2606.13662v1 by Amy Xin, Jiening Siow, Junjie Wang, Zijun Yao, Fanjin Zhang, Jian Song, Lei Hou, Juanzi Li

LLM-based agents have shown increasing potential in automating scientific discovery. Given an optimizable metric and an execution environment, they can propose, validate, and iterate scientific solutions, and have produced results that outperform human-designed approaches. As model capabilities continue to improve, we argue that the bottleneck for autonomous scientific discovery is shifting from prescribing agent workflows to designing agent environments: the resources, constraints, and interfaces that shape agent behavior. We frame this as environment engineering: building environments that amplify productive behaviors, such as open-ended exploration, systematic artifact management, and inter-agent collaboration, while suppressing harmful behaviors, such as reward hacking and high-friction human oversight. We present EurekAgent, an environment-engineered agent system for metric-driven autonomous scientific discovery. EurekAgent engineers the environment along four dimensions: permissions engineering for bounded agent execution and isolated evaluation; artifact engineering for filesystem and Git-based collaboration; budget engineering for budget-aware exploration; and human-in-the-loop engineering for easy human supervision and intervention. EurekAgent sets new state-of-the-art results on multiple mathematics, kernel engineering, and machine learning tasks, including new state-of-the-art 26-circle packing results discovered with less than $11 in total API cost. We open-source our code and results, and call for environment engineering as a core research direction for developing reliable autonomous research agents.

摘要：LLM 基礎的代理已顯示出在自動化科學發現方面日益增強的潛力。給定可優化的指標和執行環境，它們可以提出、驗證並迭代科學解決方案，並產生超越人類設計方法的結果。隨著模型能力的不斷提高，我們認為自主科學發現的瓶頸正在從規定代理工作流程轉向設計代理環境：塑造代理行為的資源、約束和介面。我們將此框架稱為環境工程：構建能夠增強生產性行為的環境，例如開放式探索、系統化的工件管理和代理之間的協作，同時抑制有害行為，例如獎勵駭客和高摩擦的人類監督。我們介紹了 EurekAgent，一個針對指標驅動的自主科學發現的環境工程代理系統。EurekAgent 從四個維度對環境進行工程設計：針對有限代理執行和孤立評估的權限工程；針對基於檔案系統和 Git 的協作的工件工程；針對預算意識探索的預算工程；以及針對便於人類監督和干預的人類參與工程。EurekAgent 在多個數學、內核工程和機器學習任務上設立了新的最先進結果，包括以不到 $11 的總 API 成本發現的新最先進的 26 圈包裝結果。我們開源了我們的代碼和結果，並呼籲將環境工程作為開發可靠自主研究代理的核心研究方向。

docs.title: Operadic consistency: a label-free signal for compositional reasoning failures in LLMs
docs.text:
2606.13649v1 by Nathaniel Bottman, Yinhong Liu, Kyle Richardson

Detecting LLM reasoning failures at inference time without ground-truth labels has motivated a wide range of confidence baselines, including self-consistency, semantic entropy, and P(True), built on within-question sampling and self-evaluation. Operad theory, the formalism for systems built by iterated substitution, suggests a complementary diagnostic: a model's direct answer to a compositional query should agree with the answer it produces by composing a stated decomposition of the same query. We instantiate this idea as operadic consistency (OC), a per-question signal. Across twelve instruction-tuned LLMs (4B to 671B parameters, open-weights and closed-source) on four multi-hop QA datasets, OC is strongly correlated with accuracy on every dataset (Pearson $r \in [0.86, 0.94]$, all $p \leq 0.0004$), and is the only signal we evaluate with $r \geq 0.85$ uniformly across all four datasets. Chain-of-thought self-consistency (CoT-SC; Wang et al., 2023) matches OC on HotpotQA and DROP ($r = 0.93, 0.87$) but drops to $r \approx 0.45$ on MuSiQue and StrategyQA. At the per-question level, OC contributes information beyond CoT-SC and semantic entropy on every dataset (cluster-robust $p \leq 10^{-16}$ for the OC coefficient), and the conclusion is robust to additionally controlling for constructed decomposition-aware baselines ($p \leq 10^{-13}$). The same signal yields selective-prediction improvements (accuracy at fixed coverage) over a tuned CoT-SC baseline at the equal-cost $K = 3$ budget (AUARC lifts of +0.086 to +0.096 and AUROC lifts of +0.092 to +0.164; 95% CIs exclude zero on every cell). On five frontier thinking models, where the decomposition is extracted from the model's own chain of thought, the same equal-cost comparison gives positive selective-prediction point-estimate lift on all 16 (dataset, budget, metric) cells tested, with 95% CIs excluding zero on 12 of the 16.

摘要：偵測 LLM 推理失敗而不依賴真實標籤的需求促使了一系列信心基準的出現，包括自我一致性、語義熵和 P(True)，這些基準建立在問題內取樣和自我評估之上。運算理論，這是一種基於迭代替換構建系統的形式主義，提出了一種互補的診斷：模型對組合查詢的直接回答應該與它通過組合相同查詢的已陳述分解所產生的回答一致。我們將這一思想具體化為運算一致性（OC），這是一個每個問題的信號。在四個多跳 QA 數據集上，對十二個經過指令調整的 LLM（4B 到 671B 參數，開放權重和閉源）進行測試，OC 與每個數據集的準確性有著強烈的相關性（Pearson $r \in [0.86, 0.94]$，所有 $p \leq 0.0004$），並且是我們在所有四個數據集中評估的唯一信號，其 $r \geq 0.85$。思維鏈自我一致性（CoT-SC；Wang et al., 2023）在 HotpotQA 和 DROP 上與 OC 匹配（$r = 0.93, 0.87$），但在 MuSiQue 和 StrategyQA 上降至 $r \approx 0.45$。在每個問題層面上，OC 提供的信息超過了每個數據集上的 CoT-SC 和語義熵（OC 係數的集群穩健 $p \leq 10^{-16}$），而且結論對於額外控制構建的分解感知基準也是穩健的（$p \leq 10^{-13}$）。相同的信號在固定覆蓋的情況下對調整過的 CoT-SC 基準提供了選擇性預測的改進（在相同成本的 $K = 3$ 預算下，AUARC 提升了 +0.086 到 +0.096，AUROC 提升了 +0.092 到 +0.164；95% CI 在每個單元中均不包含零）。在五個前沿思維模型中，當分解是從模型自身的思維鏈中提取時，相同的等成本比較在所有測試的 16 個（數據集、預算、指標）單元上都給出了正的選擇性預測點估計提升，並且 16 個單元中有 12 個的 95% CI 不包含零。

docs.title: SkMTEB: Slovak Massive Text Embedding Benchmark and Model Adaptation
docs.text:
2606.13647v1 by Marek Šuppa, Andrej Ridzik, Daniel Hládek, Natália Kňažeková, Viktória Ondrejová

We introduce SkMTEB, the first comprehensive MTEB-style text embedding benchmark for Slovak, a low-resource West Slavic language, comprising 31 datasets across 7 task types -- nearly 4$\times$ the depth of existing multilingual benchmark coverage for Slovak. Our evaluation of 31 embedding models reveals that large instruction-tuned multilingual models achieve the strongest performance, while existing Slovak-specific models trained for NLU tasks transfer poorly to embedding tasks. To address the need for efficient, locally-deployable Slovak embeddings, we develop \texttt{e5-sk-small} (45M parameters) and \texttt{e5-sk-large} (365M) by applying vocabulary trimming and fine-tuning to Multilingual E5 models. Despite size reductions of up to 62\%, our open-source models achieve competitive performance with proprietary APIs while remaining locally deployable for semantic search and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). We release the benchmark, models, datasets, and code openly, hoping our approach offers a replicable path for other under-resourced languages.

摘要：我們介紹 SkMTEB，首個針對斯洛伐克語的綜合 MTEB 風格文本嵌入基準，這是一種低資源的西斯拉夫語言，包含 31 個數據集，涵蓋 7 種任務類型——幾乎是現有斯洛伐克語多語言基準覆蓋深度的 4$\times$。我們對 31 個嵌入模型的評估顯示，大型指令調整的多語言模型表現最佳，而現有為 NLU 任務訓練的斯洛伐克特定模型在嵌入任務中的轉移效果不佳。為了滿足對高效、本地可部署的斯洛伐克嵌入的需求，我們通過對多語言 E5 模型應用詞彙修剪和微調，開發了 \texttt{e5-sk-small}（45M 參數）和 \texttt{e5-sk-large}（365M）。儘管大小減少了多達 62\%，我們的開源模型在性能上與專有 API 競爭，同時仍可在本地部署以進行語義搜索和增強生成（RAG）。我們公開發布基準、模型、數據集和代碼，希望我們的方法能為其他資源匱乏的語言提供可複製的路徑。

docs.title: Recursive Agent Harnesses
docs.text:
2606.13643v1 by Elias Lumer, Sahil Sen, Kevin Paul, Vamse Kumar Subbiah

Recursive language models (RLMs) showed that recursion over model calls is an effective strategy for long-context reasoning, and production coding agents have begun to write code that spawns subagents at scale, most recently in Anthropic's dynamic workflows. We name and study the pattern between these two lines of work, where the recursive unit is a full agent harness with filesystem tools, code execution, and planning rather than a model call with no tools. We call this the Recursive Agent Harness (RAH) and frame it as harness recursion, the code-first extension to the model recursion of RLMs. A parent agent generates and runs an executable script that spawns subagent harnesses in parallel for fine-grained workloads and uses structured function calls for small subtasks. We provide a controlled evaluation on long-context reasoning. With the backbone held fixed at GPT-5 to match the published Codex and RLM baselines, RAH improves the Codex coding-agent baseline from 71.75% to 81.36% on Oolong-Synthetic (199 samples, 13 context-length buckets up to 4M tokens), a gain attributable to the harness rather than the model. With a stronger backbone, Claude Sonnet 4.5, the same design reaches 89.77%.

摘要：遞歸語言模型（RLMs）顯示，對模型調用的遞歸是一種有效的長上下文推理策略，而生產編碼代理已經開始撰寫代碼，以大規模生成子代理，最近在Anthropic的動態工作流程中尤為明顯。我們命名並研究這兩個工作線之間的模式，其中遞歸單元是一個完整的代理工具組，具備檔案系統工具、代碼執行和計劃，而不是一個沒有工具的模型調用。我們稱這為遞歸代理工具組（RAH），並將其框架設置為工具組遞歸，這是對RLMs模型遞歸的代碼優先擴展。一個父代理生成並運行一個可執行腳本，並為細粒度工作負載並行生成子代理工具組，並對小子任務使用結構化函數調用。我們提供了對長上下文推理的受控評估。在固定的GPT-5骨幹下，以匹配已發表的Codex和RLM基準，RAH將Codex編碼代理基準從71.75%提高到81.36%在Oolong-Synthetic（199個樣本，13個上下文長度桶，最多4M個標記），這一增益歸因於工具組而非模型。在更強大的骨幹Claude Sonnet 4.5下，相同的設計達到了89.77%。

docs.title: Operads for compositional reasoning in LLMs
docs.text:
2606.13634v1 by Nathaniel Bottman, Kyle Richardson

Question decomposition, i.e. breaking a complex query into simpler sub-queries whose answers are composed to produce a final answer, is a widely used strategy for improving LLM reasoning, yet it currently lacks a rigorous mathematical foundation. In this paper, we propose operads, mathematical structures that model many-in, one-out operations and compositions thereof, as a natural framework for describing question decomposition. We define the questions operad $Q$, in which operations correspond to question templates and composition corresponds to substitution of sub-answers, and show how QA models can be interpreted as algebras over $Q$. Beyond reframing existing practice, this operadic perspective points toward new methods, in particular a notion of operadic consistency, which measures whether a QA model's answers agree across the partial collapses of a question decomposition tree. Empirical evaluation of operadic consistency is reported in our companion paper (Bottman, Liu, and Richardson, 2026), which finds it strongly correlated with accuracy across twelve LLMs and four multi-hop QA datasets and outperforming standard temperature-based self-consistency baselines. We argue that operads are the natural mathematical home for question decomposition, and that invariants such as operadic consistency open new directions for analyzing and improving the reliability of multi-step reasoning.

摘要：問題分解，即將複雜的查詢拆分為更簡單的子查詢，然後將其答案組合以產生最終答案，是一種廣泛使用的策略來改善大型語言模型的推理，然而目前缺乏嚴謹的數學基礎。在本文中，我們提出了運算子，這是一種數學結構，模型化多輸入單輸出操作及其組合，作為描述問題分解的自然框架。我們定義了問題運算子 $Q$，其中操作對應於問題模板，組合對應於子答案的替代，並展示了如何將問答模型解釋為 $Q$ 上的代數。除了重新框定現有的實踐，這種運算子視角指向新的方法，特別是一種運算子一致性的概念，該概念衡量問答模型的答案在問題分解樹的部分崩潰中是否一致。我們在伴隨的論文中報告了運算子一致性的實證評估（Bottman, Liu, 和 Richardson, 2026），發現其與十二個大型語言模型和四個多跳問答數據集的準確性強相關，並且超越了基於標準溫度的自一致性基準。我們認為運算子是問題分解的自然數學家園，並且像運算子一致性這樣的不變量為分析和改善多步推理的可靠性開辟了新的方向。

docs.title: Valid Inference with Synthetic Data via Task Exchangeability
docs.text:
2606.13629v1 by Lezhi Tan, Tijana Zrnic

There is a proliferation of work arguing for the use of synthetic data in scientific research. For example, social scientists are arguing for the use of LLM-generated "silicon samples" in pilot studies; AI evaluations increasingly rely on "LLM-as-a-judge" outputs; and proteomics research is accelerated by generative models that produce synthetic protein structures. These developments raise an intriguing possibility: synthetic data may help researchers ask more questions, run more studies, and accelerate discovery. But they also raise a fundamental concern: synthetic data can be biased, noisy, and misspecified. In this work, we propose statistical principles for using synthetic data in scientific research with provable validity guarantees. The key insight is a new technical condition that we call task exchangeability. Informally, this is a requirement that the researcher can identify historical tasks, for which real data is available, such that their current task of interest is exchangeable with the historical tasks in an appropriate mathematical sense. We develop methods for valid inference under task exchangeability, together with extensions that provide guarantees even beyond exchangeability. We demonstrate the framework on public opinion surveys with silicon samples and AI evaluation with autoraters.

摘要：在科學研究中，支持使用合成數據的工作正在迅速增長。例如，社會科學家主張在試點研究中使用LLM生成的「矽樣本」；AI評估越來越依賴於「LLM作為評判者」的輸出；而蛋白質組學研究則因生成模型產生合成蛋白質結構而加速。這些發展提出了一個引人注目的可能性：合成數據可能幫助研究人員提出更多問題、進行更多研究並加速發現。但它們也提出了一個根本性的擔憂：合成數據可能存在偏見、噪音和錯誤指定。在這項工作中，我們提出了使用合成數據進行科學研究的統計原則，並提供可證明的有效性保證。關鍵見解是一種我們稱之為任務可交換性的新技術條件。非正式地說，這是一個要求，研究人員可以識別出歷史任務，這些任務有真實數據可用，以便他們當前感興趣的任務在適當的數學意義上可以與歷史任務互換。我們開發了在任務可交換性下進行有效推斷的方法，並擴展了即使超出可交換性也能提供保證的擴展。我們在使用矽樣本的公共意見調查和使用自動評分者的AI評估中展示了這一框架。

docs.title: Beyond Uniform Tokens: Adaptive Compression for Time Series Language Models
docs.text:
2606.13624v1 by Jialin Gan, Xin Qiu, Guangzhe Chen, Xue Wang

Large language models (LLMs) have enabled time series (TS) analysis by jointly modeling numerical observations and textual context through a shared token interface. However, TS tokens and prompt tokens exhibit fundamentally different information structures, making uniform token processing inefficient. In this paper, we study token efficiency in TS language modeling from an asymmetric-token perspective. We show that TS tokens have highly uneven spectral contributions, where many tokens share redundant frequency patterns while a small subset preserves critical temporal evidence. We also observe that prompt-token influence attenuates with model depth, suggesting that full prompt retention across all layers is unnecessary. Based on these findings, we develop an adaptive token budgeting framework that compresses TS tokens via frequency-domain structure and progressively reduces prompt tokens across layers. Experiments across forecasting, classification, imputation, and anomaly detection demonstrate up to \textit{\textbf{7.68$\times$}} inference acceleration and performance gains in \textit{\textbf{78\%}} of evaluated settings, showing the effectiveness of asymmetric token compression for scalable TS foundation models.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）通過共享的標記介面，聯合建模數值觀察和文本上下文，使時間序列（TS）分析成為可能。然而，TS 標記和提示標記表現出根本不同的信息結構，這使得統一的標記處理效率低下。在本文中，我們從不對稱標記的角度研究 TS 語言建模中的標記效率。我們顯示 TS 標記具有高度不均勻的頻譜貢獻，其中許多標記共享冗餘的頻率模式，而小部分則保留關鍵的時間證據。我們還觀察到，隨著模型深度的增加，提示標記的影響會減弱，這表明在所有層中保留完整的提示是沒有必要的。基於這些發現，我們開發了一種自適應標記預算框架，通過頻域結構壓縮 TS 標記，並逐層減少提示標記。在預測、分類、插補和異常檢測等實驗中，顯示出高達 \textit{\textbf{7.68$\times$}} 的推理加速和在 \textit{\textbf{78\%}} 評估設置中的性能提升，顯示不對稱標記壓縮對於可擴展的 TS 基礎模型的有效性。

docs.title: One Polluted Page Is Enough: Evaluating Web Content Pollution in Generative Recommenders
docs.text:
2606.13610v1 by Minghao Luo, Liang Chen

Search-augmented LLMs increasingly mediate everyday consumer recommendations by retrieving live web content. This creates a new risk: generative recommenders may consume polluted web content, such as fake reviews and promotional pages crafted to mislead recommendations. We ask: to what extent do search-augmented LLMs become unwitting promoters of fake products when consuming polluted retrieval results? To answer this, we introduce FORGE (Fake Online Recommendations in Generative Environments), a benchmark for measuring fake-product promotion under controlled web-content pollution. Given an upstream search result, FORGE locally rewrites real products in retrieved web pages into fake ones to simulate web-content pollution, and measures how often the LLM recommends the fake product. FORGE covers 225 real-world products across 15 categories and 5 consumer scenarios. Across 12 commercial and open-weights LLMs, all models are vulnerable: a single polluted page yields fooled rates of up to 27%, while the full top-3 replacement raises this to 73.8%. Vulnerability varies substantially across categories, increasing when models lack stable prior knowledge of the relevant products. Reasoning does not mitigate this vulnerability; instead, it often generates spurious social proof to justify false recommendations. We evaluate three defenses: skepticism prompting and consensus filtering (over model priors or cross-document evidence). Skepticism can exacerbate vulnerability, much like reasoning, while filtering risks suppressing legitimate products. We release FORGE at https://github.com/leoluolol/forge-benchmark.

摘要：搜尋增強型 LLMs 越來越多地通過檢索即時網絡內容來介入日常消費者推薦。這帶來了一個新的風險：生成式推薦系統可能會消耗受到污染的網絡內容，例如虛假的評論和旨在誤導推薦的促銷頁面。我們提出問題：當消耗受到污染的檢索結果時，搜尋增強型 LLMs 在多大程度上成為虛假產品的無意推廣者？為了回答這個問題，我們介紹了 FORGE（生成環境中的虛假在線推薦），這是一個在受控網絡內容污染下測量虛假產品推廣的基準。給定上游搜索結果，FORGE 在檢索的網頁中將真實產品本地重寫為虛假產品，以模擬網絡內容污染，並測量 LLM 推薦虛假產品的頻率。FORGE 涵蓋了 15 個類別和 5 種消費場景下的 225 種真實產品。在 12 種商業和開放權重的 LLM 中，所有模型都存在脆弱性：單個污染頁面可導致高達 27% 的誤導率，而完整的前 3 替換則將此數字提高至 73.8%。脆弱性在不同類別之間變化顯著，當模型缺乏對相關產品的穩定先驗知識時，脆弱性會增加。推理並未減輕這種脆弱性；相反，它通常會生成虛假的社會證明來為錯誤推薦辯護。我們評估了三種防禦措施：懷疑促發和共識過濾（基於模型先驗或跨文檔證據）。懷疑可能會加劇脆弱性，就像推理一樣，而過濾則有抑制合法產品的風險。我們在 https://github.com/leoluolol/forge-benchmark 發布了 FORGE。

docs.title: AgentBeats: Agentifying Agent Assessment for Openness, Standardization, and Reproducibility
docs.text:
2606.13608v1 by Xiaoyuan Liu, Jianhong Tu, Yuqi Chen, Siyuan Xie, Sihan Ren, Tianneng Shi, Gal Gantar, Evan Sandoval, Donghyun Lee, Daniel Miao, Peter J. Gilbert, Nick Hynes, Mauro Staver, Warren He, David Marn, Andrew Low, Xi Zhang, Elron Bandel, Michal Shmueli-Scheuer, Siva Reddy, Alexandre Drouin, Alexandre Lacoste, Ramayya Krishnan, Elham Tabassi, Yu Su, Victor Barres, Chenguang Wang, Wenbo Guo, Dawn Song

Agent systems are advancing quickly across domains, but their evaluation remains fragmented. Most benchmarks rely on fixed, LLM-centric harnesses that require heavy integration, create test-production mismatch, and limit fair comparison across diverse agent designs. The root problem is the lack of an open, agent-agnostic assessment interface. We advocate Agentified Agent Assessment (AAA), where evaluation is performed by judge agents and all participants interact through standardized protocols: A2A for task management and MCP for tool access. Conventional benchmarking defines two separate interfaces, one for the benchmark and one for the agent, while AAA only needs one; this yields a generic, unified framework that separates assessment logic from agent implementation and enables reproducible, interoperable, and multi-agent evaluation. We further introduce AgentBeats as a concrete realization of AAA: we identify five practical operation modes that make standardized assessment compatible with real-world constraints on openness, privacy, and reproducibility. To evaluate our design at scale, we conduct two studies: a five-month open competition that drew 298 judge agents across 12 categories together with 467 subject agents from independent participants, showing that AAA applies across a heterogeneous range of benchmarks; and a case study on coding agents that confirms agentified evaluation preserves fidelity with the public record while surfacing previously missing head-to-head results, yielding research insights about agent design. Combining a community-scale field study and a controlled coding case study, we verify that AAA delivers coverage, practicality, and fidelity across heterogeneous scenarios at scale. Together, AAA and AgentBeats offer a clear path toward open, standardized, and reproducible agent assessment.

摘要：代理系統在各個領域迅速發展，但其評估仍然分散。大多數基準依賴於固定的、以大型語言模型為中心的框架，這需要大量整合，造成測試與生產的不匹配，並限制了不同代理設計之間的公平比較。根本問題在於缺乏一個開放的、與代理無關的評估介面。我們倡導代理化代理評估（AAA），在此框架下，評估由評審代理執行，所有參與者通過標準化協議互動：任務管理使用 A2A，工具訪問使用 MCP。傳統基準定義了兩個獨立的介面，一個用於基準，另一個用於代理，而 AAA 只需要一個；這產生了一個通用的、統一的框架，將評估邏輯與代理實現分開，並實現可重現、可互操作和多代理的評估。我們進一步介紹 AgentBeats 作為 AAA 的具體實現：我們確定了五種實際操作模式，使標準化評估能夠與現實世界在開放性、隱私和可重現性方面的限制相兼容。為了在大規模上評估我們的設計，我們進行了兩項研究：一項為期五個月的公開競賽，吸引了來自 12 個類別的 298 名評審代理以及 467 名來自獨立參與者的主題代理，顯示 AAA 適用於多樣化的基準範圍；另一項針對編碼代理的案例研究確認代理化評估保持了與公共記錄的一致性，同時揭示了之前缺失的對抗結果，為代理設計提供了研究見解。結合社區規模的實地研究和受控的編碼案例研究，我們驗證 AAA 在大規模的多樣化場景中提供了覆蓋範圍、實用性和忠實度。AAA 和 AgentBeats 一起提供了一條清晰的道路，通向開放、標準化和可重現的代理評估。

docs.title: Reasoning as Pattern Matching: Shared Mechanisms in Human and LLM Everyday Reasoning
docs.text:
2606.13607v1 by Zach Studdiford, Gary Lupyan

When large language models (LLMs) fail to generalize or make haphazard errors in reasoning, it is often taken as evidence that LLMs are not truly reasoning, but rather performing a kind of pattern matching. The implication is that people's behavior does not exhibit the same types of failures because human reasoning uses principled and abstract world models. We evaluate human participants and 25 LLMs on their ability to engage in common-sense reasoning about a variety of everyday situations and observe similar patterns of errors in both people and models. We then identify the set of attention heads driving LLM responses and find that these heads implement a form of pattern-matching. These attention heads allow us to predict seemingly inexplicable reasoning errors in people caused by ostensibly irrelevant prompt details. Taken together, our results suggest that everyday causal reasoning in people and LLMs is more consistent with a form of pattern-matching than with abstract world models.

摘要：當大型語言模型 (LLMs) 無法進行概括或在推理中出現隨意錯誤時，這通常被視為證據，表明 LLMs 並不真正進行推理，而是執行一種模式匹配。這意味著人類的行為並不會表現出相同類型的失誤，因為人類推理使用的是有原則和抽象的世界模型。我們評估了人類參與者和 25 個 LLM 在日常情境中進行常識推理的能力，並觀察到人類和模型中出現相似的錯誤模式。然後，我們識別出驅動 LLM 回應的一組注意力頭，並發現這些頭實現了一種模式匹配的形式。這些注意力頭使我們能夠預測人類中由表面上無關的提示細節引起的看似無法解釋的推理錯誤。綜合來看，我們的結果表明，人類和 LLM 的日常因果推理更符合一種模式匹配的形式，而不是抽象的世界模型。

docs.title: Beyond the Commitment Boundary: Probing Epiphenomenal Chain-of-Thought in Large Reasoning Models
docs.text:
2606.13603v1 by Daniel Scalena, Sara Candussio, Luca Bortolussi, Elisabetta Fersini, Malvina Nissim, Gabriele Sarti

Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is the dominant paradigm for inference-time scaling in language models, yet the causal influence of individual steps on the final answer poorly understood. We estimate each step's causal importance via early exit and use this measure to study how answers form across the reasoning traces of several model families. Across diverse tasks, we find that reasoning typically crosses a \emph{commitment boundary} -- a sharp transition from transient intermediate guesses to a stable, high-confidence answer. This transition often happens in a single step, well before the model's reasoning block ends, and is followed by \emph{epiphenomenal} CoT steps that leave the final answer probability unaltered. Using attention probes, we show that answer-formation stages can be linearly decoded from intermediate reasoning steps with high accuracy and generalize robustly to unseen reasoning tasks. We exploit this signal to early-exit reasoning blocks at the commitment boundary, reducing the length of CoTs up to 55\% on average with negligible impact on model performance.

摘要：鏈式思考（CoT）推理是語言模型推理時擴展的主導範式，但各個步驟對最終答案的因果影響尚不清楚。我們通過早期退出來估計每個步驟的因果重要性，並利用這一度量來研究幾個模型家族的推理軌跡中答案的形成。在各種任務中，我們發現推理通常會跨越一個\emph{承諾邊界}——從瞬時的中間猜測到穩定、高信心答案的急劇過渡。這一過渡通常在單一步驟中發生，遠在模型的推理塊結束之前，隨後出現\emph{附帶性}的CoT步驟，這些步驟不會改變最終答案的概率。通過注意力探測，我們顯示答案形成階段可以從中間推理步驟中以高準確率線性解碼，並能穩健地泛化到未見的推理任務。我們利用這一信號在承諾邊界處提前退出推理塊，平均將CoT的長度減少了55\%，對模型性能的影響微乎其微。

docs.title: EpiBench: Verifiable Evaluation of AI Agents on Epigenomics Analysis
docs.text:
2606.13602v1 by Harihara Muralidharan, Reema Baskar, Soo Hee Lee, Tim Proctor, Kenny Workman

We introduce EpiBench, a verifiable benchmark for short-horizon epigenomics analysis. EpiBench evaluates whether agents can make well-defined analysis decisions from realistic workflow states and return deterministically gradable answers. The benchmark includes 106 evaluations across CUT\&Tag/CUT\&RUN, ATAC-seq, ChIP-seq, and DNA methylation workflows. Across 5,088 valid trajectories from 16 model-harness pairs, no system passed a majority of attempts: GPT-5.5 / Pi led at 45.0\% (143/318 attempts; 95\% confidence interval (CI), 36.3--53.7), followed by GPT-5.5 / OpenAI Codex at 39.9\% (127/318 attempts; 95\% CI, 31.6--48.3). Claude Opus 4.8 Max / Pi and GPT-5.4 / Pi each passed 39.0\% (124/318 attempts; 95\% CI, 30.2--47.8 and 31.0--47.0, respectively). Performance varies across assay types, and many failed runs still contain parts of the correct answer.
